intro: Y2Mate.vc respects intellectual property rights and expects users to do the same.
The website operates as a technical tool that processes publicly accessible YouTube links submitted by users. Y2Mate.vc does not host, store, or distribute copyrighted content.

content: If you believe that your copyrighted work has been affected through the use of our service, please submit a written notice that includes all of the following information:
list: Identification of the copyrighted work claimed to have been infringed.
The specific URL(s) submitted to the service that allegedly infringe your rights.
Your full name, organization (if applicable), and contact information.
A statement that you have a good-faith belief that the use is not authorized by the copyright owner or the law.
A statement that the information provided is accurate and that you are authorized to act on behalf of the copyright owner.

content: You may also contact us via the Contact page.
If you believe that content was removed or access was restricted due to mistake or misidentification, you may submit a counter-notification containing the following:
list: Identification of the removed material and its original location.
A statement under penalty of perjury that the removal was due to mistake or misidentification.
Your name, address, email address, and contact information.
A statement consenting to the jurisdiction of the applicable courts.
sections.note: Counter notifications should be sent to contact.y2matevc@gmail.com with the subject: Counter Notification.

content: In appropriate circumstances, Y2Mate.vc may restrict or terminate access for users identified as repeat infringers.
Any person who knowingly submits false infringement claims or counter-notifications may be subject to liability under applicable law.
For copyright-related inquiries, please email contact.y2matevc@gmail.com.
For general questions, please visit our Contact page.
